rule.description: Synology NAS: Login FAILURE for user '$(synology_user)' from $(srcip) via $(synology_app).

rule.match: successfully passed the first authentication of 2FA
rule.description: Synology NAS: User '$(synology_user)' passed first 2FA step from $(srcip).
Synology NAS: User '$(synology_user)' successfully logged into $(synology_app) from $(srcip).
Synology NAS: User '$(synology_user)' logged out from $(synology_app).
Synology NAS: SECURITY BLOCK - Host $(srcip) was automatically blocked via $(synology_app).
Synology NAS: DSM firmware update was successfully installed.
Synology NAS: CRITICAL - System shutdown initiated!
Synology NAS: WARNING - Local UPS battery backup was disconnected.
Synology NAS: CRITICAL STORAGE FAULT - Drive $(synology_drive) removed or Volume $(synology_volume) degraded.
